issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 (SP_Apex_PnL) but is a dim-lookup passthrough from DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument. Should be Tier 1 with Dim_Instrument's verbatim description including NULL semantics and origin (etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData).

Footer has tier breakdown and quality score but no explicit phases-completed list (e.g., 'Phases: P1 ✓, P2 ✓, P3 ✗').

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag InstrumentDisplayName as Tier 1 — Dim_Instrument (etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData) using verbatim description from Dim_Instrument wiki. (2) Add Section 5.2 ETL pipeline ASCII diagram directly in the wiki showing daily temp tables (#NOPStart_ApexFiles_Daily, #Trades_ApexFiles_Daily, #Dividends_ApexFiles_Daily, #Zero_Daily). (3) Add Phase Gate Checklist with [x]/[ ] markers for P1/P2/P3. (4) Add phases-completed list to footer. (5) Update tier counts to 1 T1, 20 T2.
